codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the described scope: Sources tab wiring, recursive tree UI, ingestion indicators, pending-click chat prefill, preview panel, empty state, and multipart upload endpoint with safePath checks. No blocking correctness or regression issues were found in the reviewed commit.

issues.description: The upload path reads each file fully into memory (`await file.arrayBuffer()`) with no explicit size guard. Large uploads can cause avoidable memory pressure/DoS on the Bun server.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `app-worker` skill still documents root-level `npx tsc` commands, but this workspace requires `bunx tsc` from `app/` (as reflected in services.yaml).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/app-worker/SKILL.md:68 and :105 use `cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara && npx tsc ...`; .factory/services.yaml:7 uses `cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && bunx tsc ...`; handoff discovered issue also records the npx failure in this feature run.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill doc, and commit 6495e1f diff for `source-manager-view`. Feature requirements are met with no blocking defects; one non-blocking upload memory-risk note and one shared-state skill-doc mismatch observation were recorded.
